archimate:TechnologyService.name: PaaS
archimate:TechnologyService.documentation:
Definition: PaaS ABB is a Technology Service that enables the procedures for delivering application infrastructure (middleware) capabilities as a service. There are multiple types of PaaS (xPaaS), including, among many more, application platform as a service (aPaaS), integration PaaS (iPaaS), API management PaaS (apimPaaS), function PaaS (fPaaS), business analytics PaaS (baPaaS), IoT PaaS and database PaaS (dbPaaS). PaaS capability can be delivered as provider-managed or self-managed, multitenant or dedicated.
Source: Gartner
Source reference: https://www.gartner.com/en/information-technology/glossary/platform-as-a-service-paas
Example: The following implementation is an example on how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): OpenSHIFT is a secure and an enterprise-grade cloud-based container orchestration system with Kubernetes at the backend. It can be used both as a Red Hat Container Orchestration Engine and Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS). https://github.com/openshift/origin
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Technical view - infrastructure
Interoperability Saliency: The PaaS ABB is salient for technical interoperability because it provides the mechanism to deploy and publish public administration services and make them accessible through the provided remote infrastructure.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/PaaSTechnologyService
ABB name: eira:PaaSTechnologyService
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/PaaSTechnologyService
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalInfrastructure

properties.value: PaaS ABB is a Technology Service that enables the procedures for delivering application infrastructure (middleware) capabilities as a service. There are multiple types of PaaS (xPaaS), including, among many more, application platform as a service (aPaaS), integration PaaS (iPaaS), API management PaaS (apimPaaS), function PaaS (fPaaS), business analytics PaaS (baPaaS), IoT PaaS and database PaaS (dbPaaS). PaaS capability can be delivered as provider-managed or self-managed, multitenant or dedicated.

The following implementation is an example on how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): OpenSHIFT is a secure and an enterprise-grade cloud-based container orchestration system with Kubernetes at the backend. It can be used both as a Red Hat Container Orchestration Engine and Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS). https://github.com/openshift/origin

The PaaS ABB is salient for technical interoperability because it provides the mechanism to deploy and publish public administration services and make them accessible through the provided remote infrastructure.
